about.title: About Us
about.body: We are a small team of developers and automation specialists who believe technology should make your life easier, not harder. We build software that solves real problems, automate the boring stuff, and help you focus on what matters.
about.body2: No corporate fluff. No over-engineered solutions. Just clean, maintainable code that gets the job done.
contact.title: Tell Us What You Need
contact.subtitle: We'll help you figure out the best approach — no strings attached.
